mapper.select: select * from member where mid = #{mid} and (userDel='NO' or userDel='WT');

insert.if: insert into member values (default, #{vo.mid}, #{vo.pwd}, #{vo.nickName}, #{vo.name}, #{vo.gender}, #{vo.birthday}, #{vo.tel}, #{vo.address}, #{vo.email}, #{vo.photo}, 'WT', #{vo.memberType}, default, default, default);

insert into member values (default, #{vo.mid}, #{vo.pwd}, #{vo.nickName}, #{vo.name}, #{vo.gender}, #{vo.birthday}, #{vo.tel}, #{vo.address}, #{vo.email}, #{vo.photo}, default, default, default, default, default);
